name: GDPR Compliance Policy Exists
description: Ensures the organization has an approved GDPR compliance policy
query: SELECT id, policy_type, status, last_approved_date FROM policy_documents WHERE policy_type = 'gdpr_compliance' AND (status != 'approved' OR last_approved_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Create and approve a GDPR compliance policy. Review and update annually.
